1790550.name: Lady Hunt
1790550.description:
THE STORY


The Nameless City was once a prosperous place before a mysterious evil corrupted its lands. This powerful evil, coming from the bowels of the earth, infected the blood of its inhabitants, transforming them irreparably into ferocious monsters.
The sages saw in it the awakening of a divinity beyond the limits of the city... You are here to discover it

THE GAME


  • Explore 6 amazing areas
  • Fight powerful enemies and bosses
  • Collect blood and upgrade your skills
  • Find secrets and discover the story of the Nameless City

Let the hunt begin...
1790550.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
